mapper.select: SELECT * FROM knowledge_node WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY level, sort_order
SELECT * FROM knowledge_node WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM knowledge_node WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND level = #{level} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY sort_order
